---
title: "Projects"
---

# Project Name: QEvent Application

The **QEvent Application** is a specialized system built with R and Shiny for event logic and response tracking. It utilizes a country detection algorithm and a SQLite backend to manage participant questions in real-time.

### Live Application

You can interact with the live system below.

<iframe src="https://qevent.shinyapps.io/QEvent/" width="100%" height="800px" style="border:none;">

</iframe>

------------------------------------------------------------------------

I would like to add an AI tool to do text mining and remove similar questions and type the answer of that question in a live meeting also store the answer in the table in front of the question. then every time that people write similar question it recognize the answer and show them and do not store the repetitive question.

The Goal: It is important because people ask repetitive questions sometimes and cannot listen to the person who is answering questions, therefore they can see the question and answer on the board in the meeting. Also before meeting they will see the answer of their question so they will not ask repetitive question. Therefore, I can save people times.

## Objectives

-   Build a platform for conferences or seminars questions that:

-   Collects questions from participants in real-time

-   Classifies questions by topic using AI

-   Detects duplicates using embedding similarity

-   Displays questions live on screen

## AI Pipeline

### 1. Question Submission

-   User types question → Natural Language Processing (NLP) pre-processing

-   Generates embedding (vector representation)

### 2. Similarity Detection

-   Compares with existing questions using cosine similarity

-   If similarity \> 0.85 → shows warning

### 3. Topic Classification

-   Automatically assigns topic using pre-trained model

### 4. Live Display

-   Selected questions appear on speaker screen

-   Real-time typing simulation

## Technologies Used

* **Frontend/Logic:** R + Shiny

* **Database:** SQLite / PostgreSQL

* **Documentation:** Quarto

* **AI Engine:** Text Embedding Models for Similarity Detection
